settings.enabled.label: Enable RGB synchronization
settings.enabled.description: Master switch for applying Noctalia colors to OpenRGB devices.
settings.follow_album_aura.label: Follow Album Aura
settings.follow_album_aura.description: Apply the primary color from Album Aura when its palette is active.
settings.follow_nocky.label: Follow Nocky
settings.follow_nocky.description: Use an exact palette published through Nocky's Album Aura bridge when available.
settings.apply_on_startup.label: Apply on startup
settings.apply_on_startup.description: Apply the current Noctalia color when the plugin starts.
settings.openrgb_mode.label: OpenRGB mode
settings.openrgb_mode.description: Direct is the most compatible default for mixed devices.
settings.use_sdk_server.label: Use OpenRGB SDK server
settings.use_sdk_server.description: Connect to an already-running OpenRGB instance instead of standalone mode.
settings.pastel_correction.label: Correct pastel colors for LEDs
settings.pastel_correction.description: Increase saturation and limit brightness only for bright, washed-out colors that would otherwise look white.
settings.pastel_saturation_threshold.des: Colors below this saturation may be corrected.
settings.pastel_brightness_threshold.des: Colors above this brightness may be corrected.
settings.pastel_target_saturation.label: Target saturation
settings.pastel_target_saturation.descri: Minimum saturation used for corrected pastel colors.
settings.pastel_target_brightness.label: Target brightness
settings.pastel_target_brightness.descri: Maximum brightness used for corrected pastel colors.
settings.notifications.label: Notifications
settings.notifications.description: Choose when the plugin shows system notifications.
settings.poll_interval_ms.label: Integration check interval
settings.poll_interval_ms.description: How often Album Aura and Nocky integration state is checked.
notify.error.title: OpenRGB Noctalia
notify.error.invalid_color: Noctalia returned an invalid RGB color.
notify.error.openrgb_missing: The openrgb command was not found.
notify.error.helper_start: Could not start the OpenRGB color helper.
notify.applied.title: OpenRGB updated
notify.error.directories: Could not create the plugin state/config directories.
